violations.description: Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed handling ready-to-eat food with bare hands. Observed food employee handling lettuce in a serving bowl with bare hands. Ready to eat food items should be handled with gloved hands or utensils.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. Chili, prepared more than 10 days ago, was found in the walk-in cooler. Potentially hazardous foods should be used with-in 10 days or discarded. **Chili was discarded during inspection.

Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Gas range found near the walk-in cooler and freezer not under hood ventilation system. Fuel fired equipment should be provided with a hood ventilation system to disperse fumes.
Fruits and vegetables washed, handling, sink provided (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
